message:
fix: workspace compilation and test failures

- Fix Rect::left() and Rect::top() missing methods in geometry.rs
- Fix CellContent::as_char() returning NUL for empty cells
- Fix wrap_text() to preserve leading whitespace in Char mode
- Fix LayoutDebugger Default impl type mismatch
- Fix event_coalescer borrow checker issue
- Fix terminal_session read_event return type handling
- Remove unused Row<'a> lifetime parameter in table.rs

All 1,663 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
